changes: Restored TC4 GenCommon deferred decoration queues decoCommon/crabSpawner/decoUrn.
GenCommon placeBlock bridge now records queue candidates during numeric palette placement.
FeatureSelector now wraps every generated room with beginRoom/processDecorations.
processDecorations mirrors exposed-side, bedrock-showing and adjacent-eldritch checks.
Added TC4EldritchBlockVariantAdapter to centralize old blockEldritch metadata names.
Boss room placement now follows GenBossRoom: Gen2x2 quadrant then PAT_DOORWAY.
Key room placement now follows GenKeyRoom loop bounds and generateConnections(..., 3, true).
Added TC4OuterLandsDimensionAdapter and separated portal maze ticking from Overworld surface worldgen.
known_limits: Full Gradle compile was not possible in the sandbox because Gradle dependencies require internet access.
blockEldritch metadata variants are centralized but not yet split into individual 1.19.2 blockstate/model resources.
Dedicated TileEldritchLock/Cap/Trap/Crystal block entities are still recommended for Stage253-262.
